nodes.label: INC-4821
nodes.summary: Checkout latency on payments-api — SEV-2, ~12% of users.

facts.value: failover to standby; durable fix = replace disk

nodes.label: payments-api
nodes.summary: Impacted — latency is DB-bound, not app code.

facts.value: 75% of latency is the DB call

nodes.label: payments DB
nodes.summary: Degraded — high I/O wait from the storage below it.

facts.value: DB engine fine; blocked on storage

nodes.label: pay-vol (disk)
nodes.summary: Root cause — failed disk, RAID rebuild saturating I/O.

nodes.label: deploy rev47
nodes.summary: Ruled out — copy-only change, no DB/query path touched.

phases.goal: What's affected, how bad, what changed.
phases.plan: Affected service + neighbourhood from topology; light health on the symptom; recent changes; similar priors.
phases.summary: checkout latency on payments-api; DB-bound; rev47 a candidate.

steps.result: payments-api impacted; checkout downstream; status board checked
Severe latency on payments-api; blast radius = checkout. Recent deploy rev47 is a candidate.

output.impact: SEV-2 — checkout degraded for ~12% of users
suggestions: check the DB path before blaming the deploy

phases.goal: The most probable cause — ranked, with evidence and a stated basis.
phases.plan: Walk below the app; correlate vs rev47; rank candidates with a cause path.
phases.summary: Cause = pay-vol disk failure -> RAID rebuild -> DB I/O (conf 0.9); rev47 ruled out.

steps.result: 75% of latency is the DB call, not app code
rev47 = copy change only; no DB/query change
Deploy ruled out. DB I/O wait high → storage. pay-vol in RAID rebuild after a failed disk.

candidates.cause: pay-vol disk failure → RAID rebuild → DB I/O wait

confidence.basis: trace shows DB-bound; iostat await 90ms; RAID rebuild active
ruled out — copy-only change, no query path touched

phases.goal: The safest fix — propose it, wait for approval.
phases.plan: Propose a reversible mitigation (DB failover to standby); gate it for approval.
phases.summary: DB failover to standby, approved by j.rivera.

steps.result: Fail the payments DB over to the standby replica while pay-vol rebuilds.
steps.rationale: stops the I/O-bound latency now; reversible; standby is healthy

phases.goal: Confirm recovery from the user's side; a human closes.
phases.plan: Synthetic replay + before/after; revert temporaries; record the resolution.
phases.summary: Recovered; p99 4.2s->260ms; closed (temp failover to revert post disk-replace).

steps.result: Recovered from the user side. Temporary failover noted to revert after disk replacement.

output.resolution: failover to standby; durable fix = replace pay-vol disk
